dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6296 IH: Advancing Access to Telehealth Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Dingell (for herself and Mr. Bergman) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Ways and Means, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To amend title XVIII of the Social Security Act to make permanent certain telehealth flexibilities under the Medicare program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Advancing Access to Telehealth Act.

section.header: Making permanent certain telehealth flexibilities under Medicare

subsection.text: Section 1834(m) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395m(m)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (2)(B)(iii), by striking In the case that and all that follows through ending September 30, 2025, and inserting With respect to telehealth services that are furnished on or after the first day of the emergency period described in section 1135(g)(1)(B),; and

in paragraph (4)(C)(iii), by striking In the case that and all that follows through ending on September 30, 2025, and inserting With respect to telehealth services that are furnished on or after the first day of the emergency period described in section 1135(g)(1)(B),.

subsection.header: Expansion of practitioners eligible To furnish telehealth services
subsection.text: Section 1834(m)(4)(E) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395m(m)(4)(E)) is amended by striking in the case that and all that follows through ending on September 30, 2025, and inserting beginning on the first day of the emergency period described in section 1135(g)(1)(B),.

subsection.header: Extension of telehealth services furnished by Federally qualified health centers and rural health clinics
subsection.text: Section 1834(m)(8)(A) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395m(m)(8)(A)) is amended by striking During the emergency and all that follows through ending on September 30, 2025 and inserting Beginning on the first day of the emergency period described in section 1135(g)(1)(B).

subsection.header: Treatment of telehealth services furnished using audio-Only telecommunications technology
subsection.text: Section 1834(m)(9) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395m(m)(9)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking In the case that and all that follows through the Secretary shall continue to and inserting The Secretary shall;
by striking identified in paragraph (4)(F)(i) as of the date of the enactment of this paragraph; and
by striking during the period and all that follows through the period at the end and inserting on or after the first day of the emergency period described in section 1135(g)(1)(B)..

subsection.header: Elimination of in-Person requirements under Medicare for certain services furnished through telehealth

paragraph.header: Home dialysis monthly ESRD-related visit; stroke telehealth services; substance use disorder services and mental health services

subparagraph.text: Section 1834(m) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395m(m)) is amended by striking paragraphs (5) through (7) and redesignating paragraphs (8) and (9) as paragraphs (5) and (6), accordingly.
Section 1834(m) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395m(m)) is amended—

clause.text: in paragraph (1), by striking Subject to paragraphs (8) and (9) and inserting Subject to paragraphs (5) and (6);

subclause.text: in subparagraph (A), by striking Subject to paragraph (8) and inserting Subject to paragraph (5); and
in subparagraph (B), by striking and paragraph (6)(C); and
in subparagraph (A), by striking Subject to paragraph (8) and inserting Subject to paragraph (5);

item.text: in clause (i), by striking and paragraphs (5), (6), and (7); and
in clause (ii)(X), by striking or telehealth services described in paragraph (7); and

subclause.text: in subparagraph (F), by striking Subject to paragraph (8) and inserting Subject to paragraph (5).

paragraph.header: Mental health visits furnished by Federally qualified health centers
paragraph.text: Section 1834(o)(4)(B) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395m(o)(4)(B)) is amended by striking prior to October 1, 2025.

paragraph.header: Mental health visits furnished by rural health clinics
paragraph.text: Section 1834(y)(2) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395m(y)(2)) is amended by striking prior to October 1, 2025.
